items.title: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
items.summary: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister said a deal to end fighting with the US is close.

items.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
items.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative",  but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.

items.title: Married at First Sight Australia stars not told partners had drug and violence convictions
items.summary: Stars of the hit TV show say they did not know their on-screen husbands had previous convictions.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 驚見解放軍軍服「頸部2根針」！用途曝光網直呼：變態國家
items.summary: 一名網友近日在Threads發文，指控中共虐待自家士兵。她也PO出一系列照片，可見解放軍軍服領口處竟有尖針，貼文一出引發網友熱議。經查該「領口別針」是解放軍閱兵訓練時用過的做法，...…

items.title: 台灣意外入鏡！全球千萬鄉民瘋吃瓜 日本人妻實況外遇夫新進展
items.summary: 日本一位人妻抓包丈夫和小三準備來台展開一趟不倫旅行，她將丈夫護照藏起來後假裝不知情，並隨時在Threads上「實況回報」，引發全球上千萬網友吃瓜看戲。日本人妻今天更新進度，表示她...…

items.title: 烏克蘭入盟邁進一大步！ 歐盟通過6/15重啟談判
items.summary: 在解決匈牙利阻擋烏克蘭加入歐盟進程的問題後，歐盟27國12日同意，推進烏克蘭和摩爾多瓦入盟談判，兩國可望於15日正式展開第1階段談判。  路透12日報導，歐盟27國大使在1...…
